market_context_source.note: Stock module consumes market context but does not modify baseline_v1 or Alpha v1.

guardrails: No default stock universe is generated. Use GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch ticker_list to create stock forecasts.
This is a probabilistic stock forecast module, not a trading system.
Missing fundamentals, earnings, news and options are labeled missing, not inferred.
Stock forecasts are separate from the SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA baseline_v1 market model.

command_center.market_context_note: No stock universe has been generated yet.
command_center.risk_note: Add tickers through GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch ticker_list to generate candidates.

notes: The default stock universe is intentionally empty.
Use workflow_dispatch ticker_list to generate a custom stock universe.
This radar ranks forecast candidates, not trade recommendations.
